scorecard.evidence: Package layout is coherent, but audit and generation helpers need pruning.
HF optional code is isolated behind backend modules.
Compression is now a focused NumPy-only module.
Artifact schemas and generation are separate, but package exports are broad.
1 scripts are large enough to review for business logic.
Coverage is strong, but fixture-heavy tests repeat setup.
No active Contract repo edits or qrwkv_xla runtime imports are required.
2 generated or JSON docs need compactness review.
5 high/medium cleanup items should shape next specs.
